category_sources: source_facts.description identifies vgmstream as a library for playing streamed audio formats from video games.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides vgmstream; source_facts.homepage points to the official vgmstream website.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official vgmstream site; source_facts.repo is the official GitHub repository whose README provides project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/vgmstream/vgmstream, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states streamed audio formats from video games; source_facts.executables lists vgmstream CLI tools.
